params.TriggerDescription: Whenever a permanent an opponent controls is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, put a +1/+1 counter on CARDNAME.

At the beginning of your upkeep, if NICKNAME has one or more +1/+1 counters on it, you may remove all of them. If you do, exile each other nonland permanent with mana value less than or equal to the number of counters removed this way.
